#####################
 Parser Applications
#####################

The following modules are applications to parse source documents:

-   download.py

-   migrate_magic.py

-   parse_equipment.py

-   parse_fwb_spells.py

-   parse_fwn_spells.py

-   parse_spells_d6p.py

-   parse_spells_fantasy.py

-   parse_spells_mg.py

-   pdf_scrape.py
